privileged_info_summary: Verified that the environment data is synthetically injected via setup_task.sh. It contains Tiddler entries for 8 films (directed by Francis Ford Coppola, Martin Scorsese, and Quentin Tarantino) and 2 plays (directed by Elia Kazan). The verifier strictly requires that play data is excluded, all 3 film directors are grouped correctly, and release years are formatted in parentheses and sorted chronologically.
